spec_match.rationale: Touches BMP, JPEG, PNG from the chromestatus summary but skips rarely-used, UMA, embedded-in- — secondary spec surfaces are not exercised.

interactive.rationale: Live UI is real (button); controls include "Sample: pure raster BMP"; "Sample: BMP wrapping JPEG (removed)"; "Sample: BMP wrapping PNG (removed)" — well past the no-static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Only the happy path is shown — no error handling, feature detection, or boundary inputs are surfaced.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/5153489630134272.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables, no raw hex in <style>, button overrides set background and color together, no static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Surface the missing API surfaces on sniffer-probe
openQuestions.detail: The chromestatus summary for Remove BMP Extension for Embedding JPEG-or-PNG-in-BMP introduces rarely-used, UMA, embedded-in- but the page does not mention or exercise them. Walk the spec and add a short labelled control or read-out for each, so the concept covers the headline API in full.

openQuestions.title: Show the failure modes on sniffer-probe
openQuestions.detail: Right now the page only demonstrates the happy path. Add at least one of: a feature-detection probe with graceful fallback, an error/throw path (empty input, invalid argument), and a boundary case (zero, max, abort).

summary: sniffer-probe for Remove BMP Extension for Embedding JPEG-or-PNG-in-BMP has structural gaps: the rubric flags multiple fails (see open questions). Needs a pass to convert it from a placeholder into a real concept demo. ChromeStatus reference link resolved.
